Exhibition Room

Daylilies

Hemerocallis in gold and lemon, opening for a single day among hostas, columbines and the deep violet haze of lilac at the height of the garden's growth.

No. 4-1
Daylilies and Blue Hostas
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 4-2
Daylilies at Dusk
Nona Dronova · 2023 · Oil on canvas
No. 4-3
Daylilies and Columbines
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 4-4
Daylilies in the Garden
Nona Dronova · 2026 · Oil on canvas
No. 4-5
Daylilies and Lilac
Nona Dronova · 2024 · Oil on canvas
